dnd.name: The Adventuring Party
dnd.description: A band of adventurers gathers at the tavern — each a different race, wielding a different weapon. Work out who's who.
clues: The Tiefling's gold is exactly 20 gp more than the adventurer with the Viper familiar.
The Tiefling's gold is between Fenwick and the adventurer with the Wolf familiar.
The Elf's gold is lower than both Sable and the adventurer with the Raven familiar.
Human, 33 gp, and 43 gp go with Crossbow, Enchantment, and Illusion, in some order.
The adventurer with the Raven familiar's gold is immediately below the Necromancy mage.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: The Slav player's rating is exactly 100 more than the player who loves the Pin.
The Slav player's rating is between Anatoly and the player who loves the Skewer.
The London player's rating is lower than both Garry and the player who loves the Fork.
Sicilian, 1609, and 1659 go with Glass, Damiano's, and Scholar's, in some order.
The player who loves the Fork's rating is immediately below the player known for the Smothered mate.
Boris goes with at least four of Slav, Glass, Arabian, Pin, and 1659.
1609 goes with at most two of Magnus, London, Marble, and Smothered.
Garry, London, Glass, and Damiano's belong to different players.
Exactly one of these is true: Garry goes with Gambit; Pewter goes with 1559; Smothered goes with Pin.
Scholar's goes with Glass if and only if Walnut does not go with 1709.
